proof_boundary: This artifact proves Q_(11,n)(-100)>0 only for 0<=n<=1242. It does not prove the analytic order-eleven tail, heat propagation, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: Signed order eleven is the order-ten condensation numerator over a positive order-nine denominator.
Merged retained-integral Arb enclosures cover every coefficient through A_1262.
A contiguous nineteen-row repair removes the sole inherited precision seam.
rows.proof_boundary: Precision repair only; it does not infer signs by numerical approximation.

rows.claim: Cancellation-preserving H4/H5/Q6/Q7/Q8/Q9/Q10 coordinates rebuild every finite numerator.
Independent 11x11 Hankel and Jacobi-Trudi determinants verify the exceptional prefix and first positive-cone row.
Every finite order-eleven condensation numerator is strictly positive with no unresolved row.
rows.proof_boundary: Finite prefix only; no analytic tail or heat propagation is claimed.

rows.claim: The finite endpoint theorem now meets the proposed analytic tail at the next integer.
rows.proof_boundary: The order-eleven continuous curvature theorem remains open.

status: rigorous lambda=-100 signed order-eleven prefix through n=1242
